title: Monitor and maintain automotive equipment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor and maintain automotive equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor operation

pcs.text: Identify and monitor processes relevant to the task according to manufacturer specifications, workplace instructions and procedures1.2 Monitor operation of tools, equipment and machinery to ensure they are performing according to job requirements and operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and monitor processes relevant to the task according to manufacturer specifications, workplace instructions and procedures1.2 Monitor operation of tools, equipment and machinery to ensure they are performing according to job requirements and operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and monitor processes relevant to the task according to manufacturer specifications, workplace instructions and procedures1.2 Monitor operation of tools, equipment and machinery to ensure they are performing according to job requirements and operator instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor operation

elements.title: Perform minor maintenance

pcs.text: Perform minor maintenance on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and WHS requirements2.2 Identify maintenance requirements outside the range of operator expertise or responsibility and report to appropriate personnel, in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform minor maintenance on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and WHS requirements2.2 Identify maintenance requirements outside the range of operator expertise or responsibility and report to appropriate personnel, in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform minor maintenance on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and WHS requirements2.2 Identify maintenance requirements outside the range of operator expertise or responsibility and report to appropriate personnel, in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform minor maintenance

elements.title: Apply preventative maintenance

pcs.text: Check tools, equipment and machinery used in the manufacturing process according to workplace and manufacturer preventative maintenance procedures3.2 Report identified requirements of tools, equipment and machinery to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tools, equipment and machinery used in the manufacturing process according to workplace and manufacturer preventative maintenance procedures3.2 Report identified requirements of tools, equipment and machinery to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check tools, equipment and machinery used in the manufacturing process according to workplace and manufacturer preventative maintenance procedures3.2 Report identified requirements of tools, equipment and machinery to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply preventative maintenance

elements.title: Complete monitoring and maintenance procedures

pcs.text: Maintain and clean equipment, tools, machinery and work areas according to workplace procedures4.2 Identify, tag and report faulty or damaged tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete workplace documentation and equipment maintenance reports according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain and clean equipment, tools, machinery and work areas according to workplace procedures4.2 Identify, tag and report faulty or damaged tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete workplace documentation and equipment maintenance reports according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and clean equipment, tools, machinery and work areas according to workplace procedures4.2 Identify, tag and report faulty or damaged tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete workplace documentation and equipment maintenance reports according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete monitoring and maintenance procedures

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
